content.query:
SELECT distinct
affmap.AffiliateName as AffiliateName
,cast(GETDATE() as DATE) as ReportDate
,affmap.ContractType as ReportType
,srs.[SourceCode] as Source
,srs.[Descr] as SubSource
,lds.srs_id as SubSourceID
,affmap.Division as Division
,lds.id as LeadID
,lds.EntryDate
,cst.[FirstName]
,cst.[LastName]
,cst.[Address1]
,cst.[Address2]
,cst.[City]
,cst.[State]
,cst.[Zip]
,cst.[Phone]
,cst.[Email]
,lds.[Productid] as Product
,prd.LongDescr as ProductDescription
,brn.LongName as Market
,dsp.descr as CurrentLeadDisposition
,lds.ApptSet as ApptSet
,app.SetDate as AppointmentSetDate
,app.ApptDate as AppointmentDate
,lds.[NetIssued] as [NetIssue]
,lds.Sat as Demo
,case 
    when jbs.jsc_id is NULL then 'False'
    when jbs.jsc_id in (3,5) then 'False'
    else 'True'
end as Sold
,case 
    when jbs.jsc_id is NULL then 0
    when jbs.jsc_id in (3,5) then 0 
    else job.GrossAmount
end as NetSales
,job.id as JobID
,jbs.Descr as JobStatus
,job.ContractDate as [JobContractDate]
,'' as AffiliateLeadNumber
,'' as RenuityLeadScore
FROM 
[ODS].[LP_RTW_Lds_Leads] lds
left join [ODS].[LP_RTW_srs_SourceSubs] srs
on lds.srs_id = srs.id
left join [RDM].[AFFILIATES_SRS_MAPPING] affmap
on lds.srs_id = affmap.srs_id
left join [ODS].[LP_RTW_dsp_Dispositions] dsp
on lds.dsp_id = dsp.Descr
left join [ODS].[LP_RTW_cst_Customers] cst
on lds.cst_id = cst.id
left join [ODS].[LP_RTW_brn_Branches] brn
on lds.brn_id = brn.id
left join [ODS].[LP_RTW_prd_Products] prd
on lds.ProductID = prd.ProductID
left join
(select lds_id, max(SetDate) as SetDate, max(ApptDate) as ApptDate from [ODS].[LP_RTW_app_Appointments] group by lds_id) app
on lds.id = app.lds_id
left join
[ODS].[LP_RTW_job_Jobs] job
on lds.id = job.lds_id
left join [ODS].[LP_RTW_jbs_JobStatus] jbs
on job.jbs_id = jbs.id
WHERE
datediff(DAY, lds.EntryDate, dbo.fnConvertUTCtoEST (cast(GETDATE() as DATE) )) between 0 and 90
and affmap.Division = 'RTW'
